sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n703" key="a(gnew/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁγνεών</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place of purity</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατ᾽ ἀντίφρασιν</foreign>, for <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a brothel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
